scripts.typecheck: bun run build && bun run --filter '*' typecheck
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run typecheck
scripts.release: bun run build:all && bun changeset publish
scripts.build:all: bun run --filter '@anyhow/std' build && bun run --filter '@anyhow/fs' build && bun run --filter '@anyhow/schema' build
